title: hieracium aphyllum subsp. singulare
intro: Hieracium aphyllum subsp. singulare, also known as Hawkweed or Hieracium, is a flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium aphyllum subsp. singulare include treating wounds, reducing fever, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions and internally to alleviate various health issues.
